textPlain: The theme switcher in general is really cool. Especially being able to see and compare the "nude" version. It's like a modern day CSS Zen Gardenhttps://csszengarden.com/
This is not what things look like when you are drunk.(Source: have been drunk many times, and used a computer.)
i have been drunk, this is not it
now that i got to experience being drunk, id rather not, thanks
yeah but reading this is difficult and annoying, which reminds me of squinting at my blurry phone trying to read it while drunk
